meaning: adj.美丽的,女性的,(肤色)白皙的,(头发)金黄的,干净的,公平的,(天气)晴朗的adv.公平地,公正地,直接地,清楚地n.美好的事物,美人,展览会,市集vi.转晴
examples: But you can expect normal, everyday politeness, fair play, communication and consideration from your colleagues.
Theo Chocolate, founded in 2006, is the United States' only fair trade and organic chocolate manufacturer.
